description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a black grip tape surface on the top and a natural wood finish visible along the sides of the deck. The deck is slightly concave with upturned nose and tail, typical for street and park skateboards, and is supported by two metal trucks attached to four small, hard wheels. The wheels are gray and appear to be made of polyurethane, suitable for street use. The trucks are metallic and mounted in a standard configuration, with no visible branding or unique features. The skateboard has a minimalist appearance with no visible deck graphics or logos, and the grip tape is solid black without any cut-outs or patterns. The overall design is functional and classic, intended for urban environments such as skate parks, sidewalks, and streets.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip tape top, natural wood sides, gray street wheels, and standard metal trucks. The deck is plain with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and a hint of the wood edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, the concave shape, natural wood sides, and both sets of gray wheels and metal trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail, black grip tape, and wood edge, similar to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the deck profile, wheels, and trucks.
attribute_wheel_type: street, gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, metallic, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern or graphics
